nasb.text: Then lay siege against it, build a siege wall, raise up a ramp, pitch camps and place battering rams against it all around.

esv.text: And put siegeworks against it, and build a siege wall against it, and cast up a mound against it. Set camps also against it, and plant battering rams against it all around.

cnv.text: 然後安放圍城設施，建造圍城高牆，築起攻城土壘，擺列兵營，四周架起攻城鎚。

ccb.text: 然后围困这城，建垒筑台，扎营围攻，四面架起撞城锤。
